action.description:
Introduced by Senators Wirch, Roys, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Keyeski, Larson, Ratcliff, Spreitzer and Wall; 
cosponsored by Representatives Anderson, Snodgrass, Andraca, Arney, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, J. Jacobson, Kirsch, Madison, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Prado, Phelps, Rivera-Wagner, Sinicki, Subeck, Tenorio and Udell
